summary: Agency Portal & Admin Agency Management testing complete. All features working. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 4 portals (Worker, Employer, Agency, Admin) verified working. PWA manifest and service worker accessible.

ui_bugs.issue: Duplicate data-testid elements for mobile/desktop navs - use .hidden.md\:block selector or .first for desktop
ui_bugs.note: Not a bug - by design for mobile/desktop responsive

passed_tests: Auth: Admin login (admin@everduty.com / admin123) - redirects to /admin
Auth: Employer login (employer@careplus.com / employer123) - redirects to /employer
Auth: Worker login (worker@email.com / worker123) - redirects to /worker
Auth: Agency login (agency@swiftstaff.co.uk / agency123) - redirects to /agency
Backend: GET /api/agency/profile returns agency details (SwiftStaff)
Backend: GET /api/agency/dashboard returns stats (open_shifts, worker_pool, revenue)
Backend: GET /api/agency/shifts returns shifts array
Backend: GET /api/agency/workers returns workers array
Backend: GET /api/agency/applicants returns applicants list
Backend: GET /api/agency/timesheets returns timesheets
Backend: POST /api/agency/register works (returns error if already registered)
Backend: GET /api/admin/agencies returns agencies list with SwiftStaff
Backend: POST /api/admin/agencies/{id}/approve works
Backend: POST /api/admin/agencies/{id}/suspend works
Backend: GET /api/referral/code works for agency role
Backend: GET /api/academy/courses works for agency role
PWA: manifest.json accessible with correct metadata (EverDuty Flex Staffing)
PWA: service-worker.js accessible with cache functionality
Frontend: Landing page has 'Staffing Agency' role option in registration
Frontend: Agency Dashboard shows stats (Worker Pool, Revenue, Jobs, Applications, Commission)
Frontend: Agency sidebar has all nav items (Dashboard, Temp Shifts, Perm Jobs, Applicants, Worker Pool, Find Workers, Timesheets, Referrals, Academy, Settings)
Frontend: Admin Agencies view shows 'Agency Management' with Total/Active/Pending stats
Frontend: Admin Agencies view displays SwiftStaff with ACTIVE status and Suspend button
Frontend: Worker dashboard shows stats (47 shifts, £116.00 earned, 4.7 rating)
Frontend: Employer dashboard shows stats (6 shifts, 4 perm jobs)
seed_data_creation: None - SwiftStaff Recruitment agency pre-seeded with status=active
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agency portal fully functional. SwiftStaff Recruitment is the test agency (agency@swiftstaff.co.uk/agency123) owned by Tom Richards. The sidebar has duplicate data-testid elements for mobile/desktop - use .hidden.md\:block selector for desktop nav or .first locator. Admin can view/approve/suspend agencies in the Agencies view. PWA files (manifest.json, service-worker.js) are accessible at root. All 4 portal types (Worker, Employer, Agency, Admin) are working correctly.

pwa_verification.manifest_json: Accessible at /manifest.json with name='EverDuty Flex Staffing'
